title: T-107 — outbox-error surfacing through an upstream error-reporting mechanism (FT-047)
prompt:
# T-107 — outbox-error surfacing through an upstream error-reporting mechanism (FT-047)

PRD: `docs/prd/00-FOUNDATION-PRD.md` — sections: §10
Project root: `/Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira`
Original carry-forward ID: **FT-047** (from `_meta/audits/2026-05-07-foundation-final-carry-forward-backlog.md`)
Severity: **P3** (S effort)

## Goal
Outbox dispatcher accepts optional reportError + tests demonstrate plug-in path.

## Implementation contract
('1. dispatcher.ts options: `reportError?: (err: unknown, ctx: { event_id: string }) => void`.\n2. Test asserts the callback fires on a forced failure and is a no-op on success.',)

## Files (scope)
- packages/outbox/src/dispatcher.ts [modify]
- packages/outbox/src/__tests__/dispatcher-error-surface.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given reportError is set, when a dispatch fails, then reportError is called once with the error and event_id.
2. Given reportError is unset, when a dispatch fails, then no callback is invoked but the dispatcher continues processing.

## Test strategy
- RED: write dispatcher-error-surface.test.ts asserting both branches before option lands.
- Run `pnpm --filter @monopilot/outbox test dispatcher-error-surface`.

## Risk red lines
- Do not block dispatcher progress on reportError.
- Do not log sensitive event payloads in the default reporter.

## Closeout evidence
Provide: changed_files, test_commands_and_results, acceptance_criteria_status (per AC), deviations_from_prd, git_status. Use the test-driven-development skill (RED-first) and requesting-code-review at GREEN.

pipeline_inputs.description: Surface outbox dispatch errors through a configurable reporter (currently swallowed) once an upstream error-reporting mechanism exists.
pipeline_inputs.details: Today outbox dispatcher catches errors and continues silently. Add a `reportError?: (err) => void` option so consumers can plug in Sentry/PostHog/console once upstream picks one.
out_of_scope: Do not pick a specific reporter.
acceptance_criteria: Given reportError is set, when a dispatch fails, then reportError is called once with the error and event_id.
Given reportError is unset, when a dispatch fails, then no callback is invoked but the dispatcher continues processing.

risk_red_lines: Do not block dispatcher progress on reportError.
Do not log sensitive event payloads in the default reporter.
